name: Revenge Body Timer
description:
The “Revenge Body Timer” is a goal-oriented web application that leverages psychological motivation 🧠 specifically the desire for a comeback—to drive fitness consistency 💪.
The app creates a high-stakes environment where users set a timeline to achieve specific physical milestones, such as fat loss 🔥 or muscle gain 🏋️.
It utilizes a dark, aggressive cyber-fitness aesthetic 🌌 with neon accents  to maintain a sense of urgency and intensity ⚡.
features: 📅 Users input a start date and target date
🧍 Silhouette Morphing: A visual representation of user progress showing “Before” & “After” silhouettes
deliverables: Provides semantic layout includes complex animations & responsive design
